record.summary: The durable data layer: stage-3 @Entity/@Column decorators over a LedgerDriver interface, with a libSQL driver speaking a local SQLite file by default and Turso embedded-replica sync (syncUrl + authToken) when configured. ensureSchema() creates tables from decorator metadata; typed repositories give find/save ergonomics. Replaces Encore SQLDatabase so no managed database is required to develop, build, or ship.
record.title: CoreLedger: decorator data layer on libSQL/Turso
